zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.Cirencester, , Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Montagu於1350年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，他的父親John Montagu22歲，母親Margaret de Monthermer21歲。他於1383年5月4日與Maud Francis在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1399年被列為steward of wales。他去世於1400年1月6日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特享年50歲，埋葬在英國波克夏比善姆。

zh-hans.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh-hans.Cirencester, , Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Montagu于1350年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，他的父亲John Montagu22岁，母亲Margaret de Monthermer21岁。他于1383年5月4日与Maud Francis在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1399年被列为steward of wales。他去世于1400年1月6日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特享年50岁，埋葬在英国波克夏比善姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montagu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Montagu was born in 1350, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, his father, John Montagu, was 22 and his mother, Margaret de Monthermer, was 21. He married Maud Francis on 4 May 1383, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. In 1399, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as steward of wales. He died on 6 January 1400, in Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Bisham, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Montagu est né en 1350, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, John Montagu, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Monthermer, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Maud Francis le 4 mai 1383, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. En 1399, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est steward of wales. Il est décédé le 6 janvier 1400, à Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Montagu 1350 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Montagu 22 und seine Mutter Margaret de Monthermer 21. Er hat am 4. Mai 1383 in London, England Maud Francis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1399, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als steward of wales aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. Januar 1400 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bisham, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Montagu è nato il nel 1350 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, John Montagu, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Monthermer, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Maud Francis il 4 maggio 1383, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Nel 1399, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come steward of wales. Morì il 6 gennaio 1400, nel Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Bisham, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Montaguが1350年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父John Montaguは22歳，母Margaret de Monthermerは21歳であった。1383年5月4日にイギリスロンドンでMaud Francisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1399年，49歳の時，職業はsteward of walesと記録されている。彼は1400年1月6日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアシアーエンセスターで50歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアビシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Montagu(이)가 1350년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Montagu(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Monthermer(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1383년 5월 4일 영국 런던에서 Maud Francis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1399년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 steward of wales이었다. 그는 1400년 1월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 시렌스스터에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 비샤에 묻혔다.

mn.Cirencester, , Gloucestershire, England: Cirencester, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Montagu nasceu em 1350, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Montagu, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Monthermer, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Francis em 4 de maio de 1383, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Em 1399, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como steward of wales. Ele faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1400, em Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Montagu родился в 1350 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Montagu было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Monthermer, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Francis 4 мая 1383 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1399 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии steward of wales. Он умер 6 января 1400 г. в местности сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Montagu nació en 1350, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Montagu, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret de Monthermer, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Maud Francis el 4 de mayo de 1383, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. En 1399, a la edad de 49 años, su ocupación registrada era steward of wales. Murió el 6 de enero de 1400, en Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
